title: cert_add_trusted access/flags params lack guidance unlike nvm_overwrite
description: cert.rs cert_add_trusted: the access and flags parameters are u16 with no doc comments, in contrast to nvm_overwrite which gained access/flags doc comments in round 1 (citing WH_NVM_ACCESS_* and WH_NVM_FLAGS_* in wolfhsm/wh_nvm.h). cert_add_trusted passes them directly to wh_Client_CertAddTrusted and a caller has no guidance on valid values. Add the same doc-comment pattern used in nvm_overwrite: cite WH_NVM_ACCESS_*/WH_NVM_FLAGS_* in wolfhsm/wh_nvm.h and note that 0 means unrestricted/default.
